tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name IN ('github_pull_requests','linear_issues') ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position;"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT p.number AS pr_number, p.closes_linear AS linear_issue_id
FROM github_pull_requests p
JOIN linear_issues l ON l.id = p.closes_linear
WHERE p.state = 'merged' AND l.state <> 'done'
ORDER BY p.number;"}
